title: ULTRAKILL SOUNDS
description: This mod adds some voice lines from ULTRAKILL into Minecraft
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1645aa8c9c7f941d87b0a89e921882cb5fd60b.png)

# ULTRAKILL SOUNDS

This mod adds some voice lines from the two prime souls from ULTRAKILL

-When entity gets hurt: **"YOU CAN'T ESCAPE"** (Sysiphus Prime)

-When player respawns: **"USELESS"** (Minos Prime), or **"KEEP THEM COMING"** (Sysiphus Prime)


Credit to ULTRAKILL for the p-1 cover art, voice lines and being an awesome game
